title: [FIRRTL] SFCCompat: can select different values for a single invalid value

features.name: shared invalid wire as async reset value
features.description: Code should include a register with async reset where the reset value comes from a wire that is marked invalid/undefined, and that same invalid wire is used as reset value for multiple registers

features.name: x-valued reset causing reset optimization
features.description: Code should include registers with reset values assigned to undefined/x values where synthesis tools may incorrectly optimize away the reset logic due to the x value
